blocks.content: If they had Ataraxia, the reputation of the Alpheus Magic School would rise in an instant. Furthermore, if they borrowed Olivia's power, it would be possible to destroy the stronghold of the Royal Magic School.
Alpheus, who had thought that far, spoke softly.

blocks.speaker: Alpheus
blocks.content: Thad.
Thad approached and bowed his head.

blocks.speaker: Thad
blocks.content: Yes, Master.
Collect the two thousand black boxes right now. Don't give them to anyone. And destroy them in front of Shirone. Make sure Shirone confirms that they've been destroyed.

blocks.speaker: Thad
blocks.content: All right.
Thad answered without a word and nodded.
His bracelet also had its crystal orb broken.

blocks.speaker: Olivia
blocks.content: Since this was something that had never happened before in managing the two thousand times, I had a feeling that the situation could become more serious than expected.
Of course, as the incident grew bigger, the school's name would become known, but if it was Alpheus's instructions, there was no need to think about personal things.
Olivia's fierce gaze turned to one of puzzlement.

blocks.speaker: Olivia
blocks.content: I've known for a long time that you have an uncompromising personality, but I didn't know you would make such a rigid decision.

blocks.speaker: Olivia
blocks.content: Are you okay? The black box contains all the information about this fight. Not only Dante's Pascal, but also Sirone's magic circle. If you could just copy it, it would be a great help. Even if the kingdom were to secure it, they would have to pay a huge amount of money to take it.
Olivia tried to look at it secretly, but Alpheus didn't even think about it.

blocks.speaker: Alpheus
blocks.content: It's Shirone's. No one is allowed to access the information without Shirone's permission.

blocks.speaker: Olivia
blocks.content: Shirone might allow it. Think about it carefully. It's a decision that can help your alma mater prosper, and above all, it's a contribution to the magic community. Shirone is also benefiting from the accomplishments of many genius magicians.
Olivia's words were also right. Without the noble sacrifices, challenges, efforts, and talents passed down from generation to generation, humanity's magic would not have developed to this point.
That is why Alpheus also submitted a paper on quantum theory that revolutionized photon magic as a tribute to the nation.

blocks.speaker: Alpheus
blocks.content: But Alpheus' thoughts remained unchanged.

blocks.speaker: Alpheus
blocks.content: As long as Shirone is alive, he can decide at any time. But not now. It's something you can decide for yourself when you really feel the need to. If you present the choice in this way, it's no different from forcing it on you.
Olivia clicked her tongue.

blocks.speaker: Olivia
blocks.content: He was top-notch in old-fashionedness, then and now.
The competition was over, but no student left.
The highlight of this duel was to see Dante kneel before Sirone.
However, Dante, who had been defeated, had difficulty opening his eyes even with the teachers' recovery magic.
Sabina shook her head and sobbed.

blocks.speaker: Sabina
blocks.content: Dante lost. No, this can't be happening. He's defeated many strong opponents so far, but his undefeated record can't be broken at a rural school like this.

blocks.speaker: Closer
blocks.content: Sabina, calm down. For now, let's just hope Dante is safe.
Closer grabbed Sabina's shoulder and tried to calm her down.
But Sabina, already overcome with emotion, couldn't accept the reality.

blocks.speaker: Sabina
blocks.content: Aren't there days like that in life? Days when variables that cannot be expected from common sense keep occurring and everything goes wrong.
Today is that kind of day for Dante.

blocks.speaker: Sabina
blocks.content: Dante is invincible! He even had a 50% synchronization rate. He even fought at the Royal Magic Academy with 100% synchronization! There's no way he could lose to a country bumpkin like that!

blocks.speaker: Closer
blocks.content: Well, it's just a simulation after all.
Sabina turned her head abruptly at Canis' words.

blocks.speaker: Sabina
blocks.content: What?

blocks.speaker: Canis
blocks.content: Dante never fought a giant. Not even an archangel.

blocks.speaker: Sabina
blocks.content: What are you talking about? It is unacceptable to mock Dante!

blocks.speaker: Canis
blocks.content: Have you ever fought an enemy you absolutely could not defeat, risking your life? It doesn't matter if you fought them in the 2000 or if your synchronization is 100%. That's not what real combat is like.
Sabina gritted her teeth.

blocks.speaker: Amy
blocks.content: Dante doesn't know how to fight in real life. Of course, he has enough skills to be useful in real life. However, Shirone has always risked his life to get to this point.
Canis nodded.

blocks.speaker: Canis
blocks.content: 2000. It's similar to real combat. But it's not real combat. That kind of thing isn't very fun. Do you know what it's like to risk your life? When you stand on the borderline between life and death, your thoughts stop and the only thing you can think of is wanting to live. In that situation, somehow maintaining your rationality and fighting, that's real combat.
Sabina whined like a child.

blocks.speaker: Sabina
blocks.content: Having been lynched by Nade, she could understand what Kanis was talking about.
But they don't know with what determination Dante fought.

blocks.speaker: Sabina
blocks.content: Even if you belittle it as a simulation and ridicule it as only fighting opponents it could win against, there is one thing that remains unchanged.
For Dante, the 2000's duel was his whole life.
Tears welled up in Sabina's eyes.

blocks.speaker: Sabina
blocks.content: No. That's not what I'm saying. Dante… … Dante really fought with his life on the line.
There was silence for a while.
Shirone's friends also didn't want to mock Dante and his friends at this point.
No, to be honest, the anger they had been running wild for a semester couldn't be quenched by this.
But Dante was strong. It was fun to have him as a comrade competing on the same line. Although he lost to Shirone, he ended up saving face for his friends and falling down.
After an awkward moment, Dante finally came to his senses.
The students who had been excitedly chattered all became silent and turned their heads to heaven's trial.
Sabina and Closer were pitiful. They wished he had just stayed unconscious for the rest of the day, but the problem was that the student with the strongest defense also had a fast recovery rate.
As Shirone approached, the students held their breath.
Dante looked up at Shirone with difficulty, then lowered his head again as if it was no longer possible.
Then he began muttering something to himself.
Shirone waited silently.
Finally Dante stopped muttering and raised his head again.
There was no more exchange of information. There were winners and losers, and all that was left was to collect the spoils.

blocks.speaker: Dante
blocks.content: Kill me.
Dante made a shocking declaration.
Shirone kept his mouth shut and glared at Dante.
There was a commotion here and there.
He never thought that someone would rather die than kneel down.
There were rumors that he was immature and that he was being unreasonable and unmanly.

blocks.speaker: Sabina
blocks.content: -I will become the best mage. To do that, I have to train like it's real in the 2000.

blocks.speaker: Sabina
blocks.content: -But Dante, even so, two thousands is just a simulation. There are judgments, and it is bound to be different from actual combat.
Sabina could not forget what Dante had said at that time.
That is why Alpheus also submitted a paper on quantum theory that revolutionized photon magic as a tribute to the nation.

blocks.speaker: Alpheus
blocks.content: But Alpheus' thoughts remained unchanged.
